north_star: Learner создаёт, редактирует и экспортирует колоды без чтения документации
kill_switch: SRS daily-active-users drop >15pp over 2 weeks

north_star: Learner с первого экрана видит 3 кликабельных примера и не уходит без запроса
Learner понимает, что и почему изменилось в плане с момента последней сессии
Learner переносит весь прогресс на новое устройство за < 3 минут без потерь

theme: Demo: answer → tutor → quiz learning loop
north_star: Demo показывает полный 5-минутный learning loop: ответ → разбор → проверка понимания
kill_switch: demo:validate или npm run test:e2e:demo красный >2 дней

north_star: Demo доказывает retention engine: система помнит, знает что повторять, показывает динамику
kill_switch: demo:validate красный >2 дней

north_star: Demo показывает top-уровень: система ведёт студента по персональному маршруту
kill_switch: demo:validate красный >2 дней

north_star: Demo усиливает доверие к ответу: источники, confidence, переход к фрагменту
kill_switch: demo:validate красный >2 дней

north_star: Новый пользователь проходит 5 глав внутри приложения и доходит до graduation концепта без чтения внешней документации
kill_switch: tests/test_ui_tutorial.py или e2e scenario_10..14 красные >2 дней; completion rate главы 1 < 40%

north_star: AQE eval score ≥ 80% на golden set; CI-gate блокирует silent regression First Answer
kill_switch: AQE eval score drops >10pp between CI runs

north_star: Вернувшийся learner видит персонализированный next-step по mastery gaps, не общий план
kill_switch: test_tutor_orchestrator.py или tutor continuity e2e red >2 дней

theme: Course Learning Mode v2 — Course Cockpit (E30)
north_star: Learner проходит курс в single-pane cockpit без tab-hopping; ≥40% курсов доходят до graduation с Knowledge Vault
kill_switch: scenario_07 (course workspace) красный в CI >2 дней

north_star: После Progress learner видит один primary CTA и попадает в план или due/resume без лишнего tab-hopping

theme: OCR/Docling story gate before ingest implementation
north_star: Non-text corpus ingest is not started until Analyst defines a learner-facing US, acceptance criteria, and CJM mapping.
kill_switch: Owner rejects PDF/image ingest need, or Analyst cannot define a user story distinct from closed US-2.1 and US-15.5

theme: US-2.3 non-text corpus: learner-facing docs and index contract (pre-implementation)
north_star: Learner и команда понимают сценарий non-text ingest и границу с US-15.5 до старта кода ocr-docling.
kill_switch: Owner откладывает OCR; отменить wave и вернуть ocr-docling в deferred-only

theme: Source readiness diagnostic before ingest expansion
north_star: Learner understands which local materials are ready for learning, which need OCR/extraction, and what the next safe ingest action is.
kill_switch: Scope turns into OCR implementation or duplicates closed US-2.1 ingestion progress without adding source-readiness clarity

theme: Home Mode Selection v2: intent, commitment, preview
north_star: Learner chooses one of 6 home modes confidently: cards explain best-fit intent, Flashcards shows finishable effort, and preview clarifies destination before context switch.
kill_switch: home_mode_selection smoke red >2 days, or mode cards compete with the US-14.1 primary CTA priority contract

theme: Home mode grid: intent-aware ordering without hiding modes
north_star: Returning learners see the most relevant home modes first while the full 6-mode grid stays reachable, preserving US-14.1 primary CTA priority.
kill_switch: home_mode_selection smoke red >2 days, or adaptive ordering breaks keyboard navigation or US-14.1 CTA contract

theme: Course retention resilience: recovery, promise, repair
north_star: Returning course learners can recover from overdue work, leave with a concrete next-session promise, and receive short remediation before repeated misses become churn.
kill_switch: course retention smoke or targeted course workflow tests red >2 days; recovery controls conflict with existing smart resume/default recommendation

north_star: Learner profile, mastery, and SRS state survive index activation with observable migration gates.
kill_switch: learner migration gate red or lineage sync regression after index activation

north_star: Learner-facing outcomes are bounded by CJM moments, user stories, and verifiable DoD.
kill_switch: user-value work lacks CJM moment, user story, or verifiable DoD

theme: Non-text corpus: readiness UI → index proof → OCR ingest phase 1
north_star: Learner видит классификацию корпуса; общий индекс содержит проверяемые non-text чанки; первый сквозной OCR/Docling path в KB с трассируемыми источниками.
kill_switch: Ломается US-14.1 primary CTA / home hub; или полный Docling без chunk-proof и зелёных контурных тестов.

theme: MoT #2: perceived latency, wait UX, two-stage answer path
north_star: Первый ответ воспринимается быстрым и прозрачным; нет регрессии тривиального empty-retrieval; quiz контракт стабилен; eval/latency gate зелёный.
kill_switch: Рост «не нашёл» на тривиальных вопросах §8; p95 latency gate red; поломка формата micro-quiz.

theme: UX Breakthrough Wave: perceived quality and wow-moments
north_star: Learner воспринимает систему как быструю (skeleton screens, progressive reveal), плавную (seamless tutor handoff), мотивирующую (celebration overlays), и прозрачную (session analytics). UX доля растёт с 15.5% до 20%+.
kill_switch: Регрессия perceived latency >20% на MoT #2; поломка существующих tutor/flashcard/home hub контрактов; property tests для parsers красные >1 день.

theme: Smart Study Router: explainable next study action
north_star: Learner sees one local-first next study action with a short "why now" reason after key learning states, while tutor, quiz, flashcards, and dashboard remain available as explicit entry points.
kill_switch: Recommendation hides existing tutor/quiz/flashcard/dashboard entry points, depends on cloud-only scoring, or cannot explain why the action was chosen.

theme: Smart Study Router: learner-visible surface parity
north_star: Explainable SSR card is visible and smoke-tested on Progress and Flashcards hub with the same session contract as home.
kill_switch: New surfaces hide tutor/quiz/flashcard/dashboard entry points or SSR contract tests regress without owner-approved scope change.

theme: Smart Study Router Next Level: understandable route evidence
north_star: Learner can understand why the router chose this action over other visible modes and inspect compact local evidence without cloud-only scoring.
kill_switch: Recommendation hides tutor/quiz/flashcard/dashboard entry points, invents confidence, or requires cloud-only learner profiling.

theme: Smart Study Router Next Level: learner-steered pedagogy
north_star: Router explains whether the next action pays retention debt, recovers a weak concept, or continues new learning, while allowing local learner steering with visible tradeoffs.
kill_switch: Preferences silently override high-priority learning signals or route reasons stop explaining why each action was chosen.

theme: Smart Study Router Next Level: outcome receipts and quiet access
north_star: Learner sees the local outcome of routed actions and can use the router in a lower-cognitive-load mode without losing entry points or reason text.
kill_switch: Receipts overclaim progress, quiet mode removes explanation/alternatives, or accessibility fixture coverage regresses.

north_star: Локальный ML reranking повышает cards_due completion при сохранении rule fallback, ограничений latency/size и явных трасс в evidence ledger.
kill_switch: AUC-ROC < 0.75 на agreed holdout, cards_due completion ниже целевого, inference p95 > 50ms, модель > 1MB, fallback_rate > 5%, или регресс детерминированного SSR относительно rule baseline.

north_star: SSR explanations become personalized and easier to understand while deterministic routing remains unchanged and template fallback stays available.
kill_switch: Clarity score stays below 4.0, p95 LLM explanation latency exceeds 2s, token_cost_p95 exceeds 500 tokens, any shown response exceeds 700 tokens, or any deterministic SSR routing regression appears.

north_star: LLM explanation latency drops for repeat contexts via semantic caching and background pre-generation; explanation-quality feedback analytics become visible in a dedicated page.
kill_switch: Semantic cache changes routing behavior, pre-generation blocks the main thread, or feedback-insights page exposes PII.

north_star: AI Vision levels advance only when their contracts, rollout gates, and SSoT status agree; downstream levels can safely depend on explicit baseline-compatible modes.
kill_switch: A closed AI Vision package overclaims production readiness while latency, data, human-eval, or model-serving gates are still unmet.

north_star: L3-L5 consume shared telemetry, eval, fallback, and dataset utilities instead of rebuilding per-level ML infrastructure.
kill_switch: Refactor changes public behavior of app/ssr_ml_monitoring.py or weakens the existing L1/L2 fallback and eval contracts.

north_star: A rule-based weekly planner starts collecting plan-completion telemetry before any optimization or RL package is attempted.
kill_switch: Planner output is slower than 1s p95, duplicates existing daily-plan behavior without telemetry, or requires ML before baseline data exists.

north_star: Learners can mark a recommendation as accepted, rejected, or deferred so L5 policy learning has privacy-safe local data later.
kill_switch: Feedback capture stores PII, changes routing behavior before policy learning is evaluated, or lacks latency and write-success telemetry.

north_star: RAG-specific adversarial cases prove prompt-injection resistance, conflict handling, no-answer behavior, and source grounding with detailed traces for failed cases.
kill_switch: Work becomes another control-plane policy adversarial harness rather than document-level RAG adversarial evaluation against retrieved sources.

theme: Course Mode — Homework playbook + worked-example ladder (E31)
north_star: Learner фиксирует ДЗ в scope курса/темы и проходит пошаговый плейбук без смены вкладок; шаги с самопроверкой и режимом «кратко»
kill_switch: scenario_07 (course workspace) красный в CI >2 дней

north_star: Learner sees one SSR-guided home screen with seven clear destinations and no stacked ribbon above the fold.
kill_switch: Home navigation smoke red >2 days or SSR primary CTA no longer routes to the intended destination.
